narrative:
Center (precinct in Carroll County) has 836 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
